rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §252.0131 governs termination of campaign treasurer appointments for inactive candidates or political committees. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 252.0131. TERMINATION OF CAMPAIGN TREASURER APPOINTMENT.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and campaign treasurer termination statute.
